content.full_text:
1/17/90

FPPC
JAN 22 9:10 AM '90

Kathryn Donavan
General, F.P.P.C
P.O. 807
Sacramento, Calif 95804

As per phone conversation with miss Blanca
Breeze, atty, F.P.P.C. I would like confirmation
of my phone call 1/17/90 - 3:30 P.m.

My request is for usage of comm. to
Robert Bob Wagner to City Council and to state
in letter form that I am seeking to be reelected
to a 2 nd term.

In South Pasadena I served as city council
member from 1984-1988 and have decided to
run again in 1990.

Many thanks for your cooperation.

Very truly yours,
Robert Wagner
P.D 425
South Pasadena Ca. 91031
(818) 441-2251

sections.question: My request is for usage of comm. to reelect Bob Wagner to City Council and to state in letter form that I am seeking to be reelected to a 2nd term.
sections.question_synthetic: Robert Wagner seeks confirmation regarding the permissibility of using communications to promote his reelection to South Pasadena City Council for a second term.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Incoming request letter from candidate, not FPPC response. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Phone conversation reference suggests this may be follow-up to verbal guidance. Document quality is poor, which may affect accuracy of extraction.

embedding.summary: Robert Wagner writes to the FPPC seeking confirmation of a phone conversation with FPPC attorney Blanca Breeze regarding his ability to use communications to promote his reelection to South Pasadena City Council for a second term (having previously served 1984-1988).
